synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1362 Oracle Linux 9 cmake bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1362
description:
[3.26.5-3]
- Make cmake-rpm-macros requires conditional on rpm-build
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1362

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1362.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
cmake-3.26.5-3.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cmake-data-3.26.5-3.el9_7.noarch.rpm
cmake-doc-3.26.5-3.el9_7.noarch.rpm
cmake-filesystem-3.26.5-3.el9_7.i686.rpm
cmake-filesystem-3.26.5-3.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cmake-gui-3.26.5-3.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
cmake-rpm-macros-3.26.5-3.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
cmake-3.26.5-3.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cmake-data-3.26.5-3.el9_7.noarch.rpm
cmake-doc-3.26.5-3.el9_7.noarch.rpm
cmake-filesystem-3.26.5-3.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cmake-gui-3.26.5-3.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
cmake-rpm-macros-3.26.5-3.el9_7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/cmake-3.26.5-3.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[3.26.5-3]
- Make cmake-rpm-macros requires conditional on rpm-build
